title: Proxy Setup Guide for Tengu
description: Complete guide to proxy types, setup instructions, and troubleshooting for stealth operations in Tengu.

socks5.name: SOCKS5
socks5.description: Most versatile proxy protocol. Supports TCP and UDP, authentication, and IPv6. Required for Tor.

socks4.name: SOCKS4 / SOCKS4a
socks4.description: Older protocol, TCP only, no authentication. SOCKS4a adds remote DNS resolution.

http.name: HTTP Proxy
http.description: Standard HTTP CONNECT proxy. Widely supported but reveals proxy usage in headers.

https.name: HTTPS Proxy
https.description: HTTP proxy with TLS tunnel. Provides encrypted proxy communication.

tor.title: Tor Setup
tor.description: Configure Tor for SOCKS5 proxy and optionally enable the control port for circuit rotation.

start_service.systemd: sudo systemctl start tor && sudo systemctl enable tor

common_issues.solution: Check torrc for CookieAuthentication or HashedControlPassword. Run: tor --hash-password 'yourpass'
Accept the latency or use a VPN instead. Do not use Tor for latency-sensitive operations.

common_issues.cause: Tor limits circuit changes to once per 10 seconds

proxychains.title: Proxychains4 Setup
proxychains.description: Force any application to use proxies via LD_PRELOAD interception.
proxychains.recommended_config:
# Chain mode
dynamic_chain
# Proxy DNS
proxy_dns
# Timeouts
tcp_read_time_out 15000
tcp_connect_time_out 8000

[ProxyList]
socks5 127.0.0.1 9050

chain_modes.dynamic_chain: Skip dead proxies. Best for reliability.
chain_modes.strict_chain: All proxies must be alive. Fail if any is down.
chain_modes.round_robin_chain: Rotate through proxy list for each connection.
chain_modes.random_chain: Use random proxy from list for each connection.

common_issues.cause: Tool uses UDP or raw sockets
common_issues.solution: Use native proxy flags via inject_proxy_flags() instead

torsocks.title: Torsocks Setup
torsocks.description: Library wrapper that routes all TCP connections through Tor at the libc level.
torsocks.notes: Torsocks blocks UDP. Use TCP-based scanning modes only.

common_issues.solution: Use proxychains instead, or use TCP-only scan modes (-sT for nmap)

common_issues.cause: torify is deprecated, use torsocks directly

minimal_stealth.toml:
[stealth]
enabled = true

[stealth.proxy]
enabled = true
type = "socks5"
host = "127.0.0.1"
port = 9050

full_stealth.description: Full stealth — proxy + timing + UA rotation + DoH
full_stealth.toml:
[stealth]
enabled = true

[stealth.proxy]
enabled = true
type = "socks5"
host = "127.0.0.1"
port = 9050

[stealth.wrapper]
mode = "proxychains"

[stealth.timing]
enabled = true
min_delay_ms = 500
max_delay_ms = 5000
jitter_percent = 40

[stealth.user_agent]
enabled = true
browser_type = "random"
rotate_every = 5

[stealth.dns]
enabled = true
method = "doh"
doh_url = "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query"

verification_workflow: 1. Start Tor: sudo systemctl start tor
